docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZOCCA, MARY
ORDER RE: CONTINUNACE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. CONTINUED TO JUNE 30, 2021 @ 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED.
ORDER DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES CASE SETTLED.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,322.12 FILED BY MAMUAD, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT ZOCCA, MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2021 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOT FOUND RETURN (NON ESTUS) RE: PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAMUAD, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT ZOCCA, MARY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-30-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINE MAMUAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARY ZOCCA IS PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF IS STILL OWED AN ADDITIONAL $500.00 FOR MONIES WITHHELD FROM PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLAINTIFF RETURNS PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $815.00 TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OWED TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT IS $1,315.00 FOR WITHHELD SECURITY DEPOSIT STILL OWED TO PLAINTIFF. A PROGRESS REPORT DATE HAS BEEN SET FOR JUNE 30, 3021 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPARTMENT 506. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES, THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-07-2021 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-01-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
